steps.t: The crow was last seen in the western portion of Aldburg. Bertred wants you to find his talking crow and attempt to speak with it in order to prove th…
The talking crow is in the western part of Aldburg. Bertred asked to to attempt to speak with the talking crow.
There is a child hiding behind the bush near the crow. You should speak with the child.
Bertred is at his home in Aldburg. The decision lies with you: speak with the child and let him go or speak with Bertred and bring the wrath of the ma…
